collections.name: evolucoes
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_evolucoes_patient_date ON evolucoes (patient_id, session_date DESC)

collections.name: anamneses
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_anamneses_patient ON anamneses (patient_id)

apiRules.list: @request.auth.id != '' && (@request.auth.profile = 'admin' || sender_id = @request.auth.id || recipient_id = @request.auth.id || patient_id.user_id = @request.auth.id || patient_id.email = @request.auth.email || ((@request.auth.profile = 'secretaria' || @request.auth.profile = 'psicologo') && patient_id.id_clinica != '' && patient_id.id_clinica = @request.auth.id_clinica))
apiRules.view: @request.auth.id != '' && (@request.auth.profile = 'admin' || sender_id = @request.auth.id || recipient_id = @request.auth.id || patient_id.user_id = @request.auth.id || patient_id.email = @request.auth.email || ((@request.auth.profile = 'secretaria' || @request.auth.profile = 'psicologo') && patient_id.id_clinica != '' && patient_id.id_clinica = @request.auth.id_clinica))

collections.name: config_clinica
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_config_clinica_user ON config_clinica (user_id)

collections.name: automacoes
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_automacoes_user_tipo ON automacoes (user_id, tipo)

collections.name: notificacoes
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_notificacoes_user_status ON notificacoes (user_id, status)

collections.name: assinaturas
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_assinaturas_registro ON assinaturas (registro_id, tipo_registro)
